isolation.type: pure Rust unit tests with mock transports

assertions.title: Detection runs after SSH auth, before Codex bootstrap

steps.action: Code review: inspect run_guided_ssh_connect() in src/ffi/ssh.rs
steps.expected: detect_all_agents() call appears between SshClient::connect() and resolve_codex_binary_optional_with_shell()
steps.observed: Sequence confirmed: (1) SshClient::connect() → ssh_client, (2) progress step DetectingAgents set to InProgress, (3) detect_all_agents(&ssh_client).await → detected, (4) if detected.has_multiple_agents() → return early, (5) resolve_codex_binary_optional_with_shell() → Codex bootstrap

steps.expected: Test passes — DetectingAgents step appears before FindingCodex in bootstrap progress

evidence.codeReview: src/ffi/ssh.rs lines ~340-370: detection block with DetectingAgents step inserted between SSH connect and FindingCodex

assertions.title: When only Codex found, proceeds with normal Codex bootstrap (unchanged)

steps.expected: Test passes — Codex-only detection does not set pending_agent_selection
steps.observed: val_guided_002_codex_only_proceeds_normally PASSED — pending_agent_selection remains false, detected_agents is empty, FindingCodex step is still Pending

assertions.title: When multiple agents found, returns detected agent list for iOS picker

steps.expected: Test passes — multiple agents populate progress with detected_agents list and pending_agent_selection=true
steps.observed: val_guided_003_multiple_agents_populates_progress PASSED — progress.detected_agents contains 2 entries (codex, pi-native), pending_agent_selection=true, terminal_message set

assertions.title: Detection failure falls through to Codex path

steps.action: Code review: inspect detect_all_agents() timeout handling in src/provider/detection.rs
steps.expected: Timeout/error returns Codex-only fallback, not propagated error
steps.observed: detect_all_agents() wraps tokio::join! in tokio::time::timeout(DETECTION_TIMEOUT). On timeout, returns empty Pi/Droid results + Codex baseline. Individual probe failures are logged and omitted.

steps.expected: Test passes — detection failure falls through to Codex path without blocking
steps.observed: val_guided_004_detection_failure_falls_through PASSED — pending_agent_selection=false, detected_agents empty, FindingCodex step is Pending (flow continues)

evidence.codeReview: src/provider/detection.rs: detect_all_agents() uses unwrap_or_else on timeout to return partial results + Codex baseline

steps.expected: Test passes — Codex flow has detection step in bootstrap sequence
steps.observed: val_guided_005_codex_flow_has_detection_step_in_bootstrap PASSED — DetectingAgents step present, defaults to Pending; pending_agent_selection=false; detected_agents empty
test result: ok. 1032 passed; 0 failed; 9 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out; finished in 61.56s

evidence.fullSuiteOutput: test result: ok. 1032 passed; 0 failed; 9 ignored; 0 measured

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-GUIDED-001 through VAL-GUIDED-004 verified through code review and targeted cargo tests. VAL-GUIDED-005 confirmed via full regression suite: 1032/1032 tests pass with 0 failures. Detection is correctly placed after SSH auth and before Codex bootstrap; Codex-only flow is unchanged; multiple-agent detection surfaces the picker list; detection failures gracefully fall through to Codex.
